name: Qualitas Limited
analysis: QAL has reclaimed its short-term moving averages — the 9 has crossed up through the 26 and price is back above both. It is coming off a base, 29% below its one-year high, so there is room to run. Trade idea: entry A$2.8700, stop A$2.5097, target A$3.1932 (0.90:1) — then trail it.
